entities.name: YM2612
entities.description: 6-channel FM synthesizer chip used in the Sega Genesis / Mega Drive. 4 operators per channel.

entities.name: YM2612 Application Manual
entities.description: Official technical documentation for the YM2612 chip hardware and register map.

invariants.name: Operator Phase Invariant
invariants.description: FM operator phase reset ensures deterministic timbral behavior at key-on.

invariants.name: Series Modulation Compression
invariants.description: Increase in modulator stack depth (Algorithms 0-3) compresses available harmonic space into high-frequency sidebands.
